item.description:
# iData v0.1.5
Released: 2026-03-08
## Highlights
- Fixed a tutorial-session rendering regression where the first VisiData toolbar/menu row could disappear and cause visual misalignment. - Improved embedded terminal display readiness handling to avoid repeated transcript replay during rebind/update cycles. - Refined collapsed-sidebar interactions: - destructive actions now require `Command` hover intent more consistently - click behavior in narrow history mode is more reliable - Updated status/input area layout to a single unified status panel style with clearer English-input indication. - Slowed the full-window shimmer sweep to reduce distraction and improve perceived smoothness.
## Notes
- Build remains unsigned/not notarized for local distribution.
